title: 2023 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
page_name: 2023 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
page_topic: 2023 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
content:
Dental coverage is offered as part of some SHOP health plans, but not all of them. If you're looking for dental coverage, preview 2023 SHOP plans and prices. (Stand-alone dental plans offered through the SHOP Marketplace are separate dental plans that employees can buy when they buy a SHOP Marketplace health plan at the same time.)

You can download data for 2023 SHOP dental plans:

  • Instructions (PDF, 193 KB)
  • 2023 SHOP dental plan data (ZIP file, 79 MB)

You can also get:

  • 2023 SHOP health plan information for small businesses
  • 2022 SHOP dental plan information

Learn more about the Affordable Care Act.
